error_message: JA translation silently dropped; JA indicator stays grey after Translate All + Save
root_cause: 1) generateSlug() strips CJK chars producing empty slug; Appwrite rejects empty required field. 2) Tiptap editor content not flushed to transState before base.content is read, leaving base.content stale/empty and skipping the content-translation block for all locales.
trigger: User clicks Traduzir Todos on an article with CJK-only translated title, then saves
approach: 1) Flush Tiptap editor to transState before reading base. 2) After generateSlug, if result is empty fall back to {ptSlug}-{lang}.
prevention_details: CJK slug fallback test + PUT handler JA upsert regression test
commit_message: fix(editor): flush Tiptap before translateAll and add CJK slug fallback

error_message: Language indicator dots (JA/ZH) remain grey in articles list after saving new translations
root_cause: Nuxt 3.21 useAsyncData caches results in nuxtApp.payload.data[key] via default getCachedData. After navigateTo('/admin/artigos'), the list page receives cached stale data — no re-fetch occurs. The delete flow worked around this by calling refresh() explicitly, but save/navigate did not invalidate the cache.
trigger: User translates article to JA/ZH, clicks Confirmar e Salvar, and is redirected to the articles list
approach: Call clearNuxtData('admin-articles') immediately after the PUT succeeds and before navigateTo() so that useAsyncData re-fetches on the next visit to the list page
prevention_details: E2E test asserts a fresh GET /api/admin/articles/list occurs after save+redirect. Pattern: always call clearNuxtData(key) before navigateTo() when the destination page caches via useAsyncData.
commit_message: fix(admin): clear articles list cache after saving article edit
